title: Aatman Samarpan launched as global initiative for holistic wellness in legal fraternity
description: Aatman Samarpan, a global initiative aimed at promoting holistic wellness within the legal fraternity, was launched by Bithika Anand at the 3rd edition of Vidhi Utsav held at the Constitution Club of India in New Delhi on March 28, 2026.Anand, Founder, Chairman and Managing Director of Legal League Consulting and Founder and CEO of Human Elevation, said the initiative aims to create a platform where lawyers can rediscover balance, purpose, and inner strength, enabling them to perform at their hi
